TimeEntry.Title: Please block spam email
TimeEntry.Notes: Received an email from user as user is getting some spam email. So, I logged into the MS office 365 admin center and blocked the suspicious email id at our end. Hence closing this ticket.

BWLAP-10, BWLAP-15,  BWLAP-20.
